name: Standard BioTools Inc.
description: Standard BioTools Inc. is a life science technology company that provides innovative genomic and proteomic solutions to researchers and clinical laboratories worldwide. Formerly known as Fluidigm Corporation, the company specializes in developing advanced analytical systems, including mass cytometry and microfluidics platforms, alongside associated assays and reagents. These technologies enable deep biological insights in areas such as oncology, immunology, and drug discovery. Headquartered in the United States, Standard BioTools supports a diverse range of customers, including academic institutions, biopharmaceutical companies, and contract research organizations, by delivering tools that facilitate complex biological analysis and precision medicine research.
